pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target properties from 1.8 to 21 to support the new JDK.
Migrate from Spring Boot 2.6.0 to 3.5.5, which requires Java 17+ and Jakarta EE.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to comply with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
Change the project groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang.
Add a new module for message queue support (Kafka/RocketMQ).
Add a new module for logging functionality.
Add a new module for rate limiting functionality.
Add a new module for idempotency control.
Introduce Spring Cloud and Spring Cloud Alibaba BOMs for microservice support.
Add MyBatis-Plus and its generator as managed dependencies.
Add Knife4j (Swagger UI) starter for API documentation.
Add Redisson starter for distributed locking and caching.
Add RocketMQ Spring Boot starter for message queuing.
Add MapStruct and its processor for object mapping.
Add flatten-maven-plugin to handle CI-friendly versioning.
Configure maven-gpg-plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Configure central-publishing-maven-plugin for deploying to Maven Central.
Remove the protobuf-maven-plugin as it is no longer needed.
Remove PowerMock dependencies which are often incompatible with newer Java/Spring versions.

spring-base-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.
Replaced hardcoded parent version with ${revision} property to support Maven Flattening Plugin for release management.
Added name, description, and url elements to the POM for better artifact metadata in repositories.
Marked the Lombok dependency as optional to prevent it from being transitively included in downstream projects.
Added fastjson2 as a dependency to provide JSON serialization capabilities.
Added Google Gson as a dependency to provide an alternative JSON serialization library.
Added spring-boot-starter as a provided dependency to ensure core Spring Boot classes are available at compile time.

spring-base-csrf/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.
Switched the parent POM version from a hardcoded snapshot to a managed property for better version control.
Added standard Maven project metadata including name, description, and URL.
Updated the internal dependency groupId to match the new namespace.
Marked the Lombok dependency as optional to prevent transitive inclusion in downstream projects.
Added the Spring Boot autoconfigure processor to generate metadata for auto-configuration classes.
Added the Spring Boot configuration processor to generate metadata for externalized configuration properties.

spring-base-lock/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.
Switched the parent version from a hardcoded snapshot to a managed property for better version control.
Added name, description, and url metadata to the POM for better artifact documentation.
Added spring-base-core dependency to access core framework utilities.
Added hutool-all dependency to utilize the Hutool utility library.
Added redisson-spring-boot-starter to enable Redisson-based distributed locking capabilities.
Replaced spring-boot-starter-data-redis with spring-boot-starter-aop, likely shifting from direct Redis operations to AOP-based locking mechanisms.

spring-base-sign/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.
Switched parent version to ${revision} to support Maven Flattening Plugin for release version management.
Added name, description, and url elements to the POM for better artifact metadata.
Removed the dependency on spring-base-util, likely due to refactoring or removal of shared utilities.
Marked Lombok as an optional dependency to prevent transitive inclusion in downstream projects.
Added Apache Commons Lang3 dependency for utility methods.
Added Apache Commons Codec dependency for encoding/decoding utilities.
Added Spring Boot AutoConfigure Processor to generate metadata for auto-configuration classes.
Added Spring Boot Configuration Processor to generate metadata for externalized configuration properties.

spring-base-util/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to support Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Change the Maven groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with new project coordinates.
Switch parent version to ${revision} property, indicating adoption of the maven-flatten-plugin for version management.
Add name, description, and url fields to the POM for better repository metadata and documentation.
Mark Lombok as an optional dependency to prevent it from being transitively included in downstream projects.
Add Apache Commons IO as a dependency for utility file and stream operations.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation to enable Bean Validation support in the module.

spring-base-xss/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent POM groupId to reflect a new organization or namespace.
Switched parent version to a property placeholder to support flattened POM builds.
Added standard Maven project metadata fields like name, description, and URL.
Marked the Lombok dependency as optional to prevent transitive dependency leakage.

spring-base-core/README.md.general_idea: Document the addition of a state machine component with Fluent API support.
spring-base-core/README.md.human_impl: - 添加statemachine状态机，支持Fluent API调用

spring-base-core/README.md.general_idea: Document the addition of an SPI extension factory for easier implementation extension.
spring-base-core/README.md.human_impl: - 添加SPI扩展工厂，方便扩展定义实现，参考`SpiExtensionFactory`

spring-base-csrf/README.md.general_idea: Changed the Maven groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to reflect a namespace migration.
Switched the version placeholder from a custom property to the standard project version property.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/resources/META.general_idea: Update the auto-configuration class reference in spring.factories to reflect the new package name.

spring-base-lock/README.md.general_idea: Rewrite README to document new architecture features like pluggable executors, key resolvers, and fallback mechanisms.
spring-base-lock/README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Configuration' section with 'Overview' detailing LockExecutorResolver, LockKeyResolver, and fallback options.

spring-base-lock/README.md.general_idea: Update usage instructions to reflect the shift from manual-only to AOP-annotated locking support.
spring-base-lock/README.md.human_impl: Added sections for @EnableLockAspect configuration and @Lock annotation usage with SpEL examples.

spring-base-lock/README.md.general_idea: Document the new fallback behavior capabilities for distributed lock failures.
spring-base-lock/README.md.human_impl: Added detailed examples for fallback methods within the same bean and external beans.

spring-base-lock/README.md.general_idea: Fix syntax highlighting in code blocks by adding language identifiers.
spring-base-lock/README.md.human_impl: Changed ``` to ```java in multiple code snippets.

spring-base-lock/README.md.general_idea: Clarify the semantic meaning of the retry parameter in the execute method documentation.
spring-base-lock/README.md.human_impl: Changed comment/code snippet from -1 to Long.MAX_VALUE to explicitly indicate infinite retries.
